privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Fiji MRI Stack sample image, not synthetic data. The image consists of 27 slices (verified correct), but the metadata contains critical dimensional errors: the task claims 256×256 pixels when the actual MRI Stack is 186×226 pixels. This dimensional discrepancy will result in failed verification if any agent-generated results are compared against expected 256×256 properties. The statistical ranges for z-projection means are plausible but unverified without running actual projections on the MRI Stack image.
